## Estadísticas de Resumen Log

```{r}
datos %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            media_log = mean(T_0.01_RotD50),
            sd_log = sd(T_0.01_RotD50),
            mediana_log = median(T_0.01_RotD50))
```

## Resumen en escala real

```{r}
datos %>%
  summarise(media_g = mean(Acc_real),
            sd_g = sd(Acc_real),
            mediana_g = median(Acc_real),
            min_g = min(Acc_real),
            max_g = max(Acc_real))
```
